headline: Merck (MRK) Stock Gets New Outperform Rating from CICC
summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) is included among the 10 Reliable Dividend Stocks to Buy for Long-Term Investors. On June 24, CICC initiated coverage of Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) with an Outperform rating. It also set a $138 price target on the stock. Merck also provided an updated outlook during its first-quarter 2026 earnings call. […]

headline: Merck KGaA, Darmstadt, Germany, Agrees to Acquire Bio-Techne, Strengthening Leadership Position in Fast-Growing Life Sciences Markets

headline: Germany’s Merck Is Buying Bio-Techne for $11.3 Billion
summary: Shares of  Bio-Techne  surged before the opening bell on Thursday after Germany’s  Merck KGaA  announced it agreed to purchase the company for $11.3 billion.  Bio-Techne stock jumped 20% to $70.58 in premarket trading on Thursday.  Merck KGaA plans to acquire Bio-Techne for $73 a share, according to the media release, representing a 24% premium based on the stock’s closing price from Wednesday.

content.title: Germany’s Merck Is Buying Bio-Techne for $11.3 Billion

Merck KGaA plans to acquire Bio-Techne for $73 a share, according to the media release, representing a 24% premium based on the stock’s closing price from Wednesday.

headline: Bio-Techne Is Today’s Top S&P 500 Stock. Germany’s Merck Is Paying a 24% Premium for the Company.
summary: Shares of  Bio-Techne  surged Thursday after Germany’s  Merck KGaA  announced it agreed to purchase the company for $11.3 billion.  Bio-Techne stock jumped 19% to $70.25 on Thursday, leading the  for the trading session and set to log its best daily percentage gain since May 1, 2003, according to Dow Jones Market Data.  Merck KGaA plans to acquire Bio-Techne for $73 a share, according to the media release, representing a 24% premium based on the stock’s closing price from Wednesday.

Bio-Techne stock jumped 19% to $70.25 on Thursday, leading the  for the trading session and set to log its best daily percentage gain since May 1, 2003, according to Dow Jones Market Data.  Merck KGaA plans to acquire Bio-Techne for $73 a share, according to the media release, representing a 24% premium based on the stock’s closing price from Wednesday.

headline: Merck KGaA to buy Bio-Techne for $11.3bn in life science footprint expansion
summary: The deal is Merck’s largest since 2015, when it spent $17bn on acquiring Sigma-Aldrich, also a life sciences specialist.

content.title: Merck KGaA to buy Bio-Techne for $11.3bn in life science footprint expansion
content.summary: The deal is Merck’s largest since 2015, when it spent $17bn on acquiring Sigma-Aldrich, also a life sciences specialist.

headline: Gilead's Breast Cancer Drug Trodelvy Wins FDA Nod for Expanded Use
summary: GILD wins FDA approval to expand Trodelvy into first-line metastatic triple-negative breast cancer, opening a broader treatment opportunity.

headline: MRK Gets EU Nod for Keytruda & Padcev Combination in Bladder Cancer
summary: Merck wins EU approval for Keytruda plus Padcev in patients with resectable muscle-invasive bladder cancer who are ineligible for cisplatin-based chemotherapy.

content.title: MRK Gets EU Nod for Keytruda & Padcev Combination in Bladder Cancer
content.summary: Merck wins EU approval for Keytruda plus Padcev in patients with resectable muscle-invasive bladder cancer who are ineligible for cisplatin-based chemotherapy.

headline: Alger Russell Innovation Index Updates for Second Quarter 2026
summary: Fred Alger Management, LLC ("Alger"), a privately held growth equity investment manager, today announced the quarterly rebalancing of the Alger Russell Innovation Index ("Index"). Following the close of trading on Friday, June 26, 2026, the Index will be rebalanced, and the following changes will be effective.
